case: PKP pkp-lib — FormHandler validation focus and error relationships
type: Web app framework / JavaScript form controller

findings.title: Form validation focus and error relationships
findings.issue: Failed submissions in shared PKP forms could leave keyboard and screen-reader users without a reliable programmatic path from an invalid control to its validation message.
findings.fix: Move focus to the first invalid control, add stable validation message ids, preserve and extend aria-describedby, manage aria-invalid only while invalid, and clean up managed state when controls become valid.
